category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Azerbaijan market.

title.en: China-to-Azerbaijan LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入阿塞拜疆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入亞塞拜然：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Azerbaijan AZSTAND conformity (AZS standards adopting IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471), national energy programmes, and importer obligations versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Azerbaijan operates a national conformity regime and is not an EAEU member.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与阿塞拜疆 AZSTAND 合格评定（AZS 标准采用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、国家能效计划及进口商义务差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。阿塞拜疆实行国家合格评定制度，非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與亞塞拜然 AZSTAND 合格評定（AZS 標準採用 IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471）、國家能效計劃及進口商義務差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。亞塞拜然實行國家合格評定制度，非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Azerbaijan law, AZSTAND conformity rules, adopted AZS/IEC standards, energy-programme requirements, and in-country importer obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿塞拜疆法律、AZSTAND 合格评定规则、采用的 AZS/IEC 标准、能效计划要求及在地进口商义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行亞塞拜然法律、AZSTAND 合格評定規則、採用的 AZS/IEC 標準、能效計劃要求及在地進口商義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Azerbaijan must obtain AZSTAND conformity for regulated lighting products; demonstrate electrical safety against AZS standards adopting IEC 60598-1 (luminaires) and the LED control-gear / module standards; meet EMC requirements via AZS standards adopting CISPR 15 / IEC 61547; provide photobiological-safety documentation where the adopted AZS/IEC 62471 framework applies; satisfy any national energy-programme / efficiency requirement (Azerbaijan operates national energy programmes rather than an EU-style mandatory energy label); and appoint or work through an in-country importer for conformity and market access. Azerbaijan has no horizontal RoHS-style hazardous-substance restriction and is not an EAEU member, so EAEU EAC marking does not apply. The Azerbaijan grid is 220/380 V, 50 Hz — matching China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz nominal — so no nominal voltage/frequency redesign is required. CCC certification and Chinese GB test reports are not automatically accepted; conformity is assessed under the Azerbaijan national regime.
answer_first.zh: 向阿塞拜疆出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：为受管制照明产品取得 AZSTAND 合格评定；依据采用 IEC 60598-1（灯具）及 LED 控制装置/模块标准的 AZS 标准证明电气安全；通过采用 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 的 AZS 标准满足 EMC 要求；在采用 AZS/IEC 62471 框架适用时提供光生物安全文件；满足任何国家能效计划/能效要求（阿塞拜疆实行国家能效计划，而非欧盟式强制能效标签）；并指定或通过在地进口商完成合格评定及市场准入。阿塞拜疆无横向 RoHS 式有害物质限制，且非 EAEU 成员，故 EAEU EAC 标志不适用。阿塞拜疆电网为 220/380 V，50 Hz——与中国 220/380 V，50 Hz 标称一致——故无须进行标称电压/频率改设计。CCC 认证及中国 GB 检测报告不被自动接受；合格评定须依阿塞拜疆国家制度进行。
answer_first.zht: 向亞塞拜然出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：為受管制照明產品取得 AZSTAND 合格評定；依據採用 IEC 60598-1（燈具）及 LED 控制裝置/模組標準的 AZS 標準證明電氣安全；通過採用 CISPR 15 / IEC 61547 的 AZS 標準滿足 EMC 要求；在採用 AZS/IEC 62471 框架適用時提供光生物安全文件；滿足任何國家能效計劃/能效要求（亞塞拜然實行國家能效計劃，而非歐盟式強制能效標籤）；並指定或通過在地進口商完成合格評定及市場准入。亞塞拜然無橫向 RoHS 式有害物質限制，且非 EAEU 成員，故 EAEU EAC 標誌不適用。亞塞拜然電網為 220/380 V，50 Hz——與中國 220/380 V，50 Hz 標稱一致——故無須進行標稱電壓/頻率改設計。CCC 認證及中國 GB 檢測報告不被自動接受；合格評定須依亞塞拜然國家制度進行。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Each review cycle must re-verify AZSTAND conformity scope, the list of adopted AZS/IEC standards for lighting, and any national energy-programme thresholds against current Azerbaijan regulator publications.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Azerbaijan conformity scope and adopted-standard references must be re-verified against current AZSTAND / national regulator sources on each review cycle. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
